rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §8.155 governs duties of non-physician mental health professionals and is wholly unrelated to property tax exemptions.
quote: Sec. 8.155. DUTIES OF NON-PHYSICIAN MENTAL HEALTH PROFESSIONAL.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this mental health professional duties statute.
